arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Rayo Vallecano vs Real Madrid, 2024 La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Rayo Vallecano in what will be the team’s last match before the Intercontinental Cup. Real Madrid are coming off two solid away wins against Girona and Atalanta, so Los Blancos must find a way to keep their good form and their momentum going by earning the three points in Vallecas tonight.

arts.ttl: Rayo Vallecano vs Real Madrid LIVE: Possible lineups and latest news
arts.sum: Their defensive solidity has been a key strength, with only 16 goals conceded in 15 matches. Good evening everybody and welcome to another MARCA in English live blog, this time taking you through the LaLiga clash between Rayo Vallecano and Real Madrid from the Estadio de Vallecas.

arts.sum: The arrival of Kylian Mbappe has brought with it its own challenges and one of the effects of the Frenchman's signing is that some of Real Madrid's attacking players are struggling for minutes. Below, FootballTransfers looks at five players who could leave Real Madrid in January...
